name: lightsaber
description: Find hotspots in your codebase using Git history, complexity, and change coupling. Your commit history reveals where your code actually hurts.
author: YodaMan Community

hotspotThreshold.description: Files with health score below this are hotspots

commitLimit.description: Number of recent commits to analyze

daysToAnalyze.description: Time window for change frequency analysis

excludePatterns.description: Glob patterns to exclude from analysis
